project.name: XZ Builds
project.themeNotes: The site adopts a clean and structured aesthetic with high contrast elements, focusing on a minimalist design that emphasizes the user's engineering background. The layout is functional, with a focus on showcasing projects and technical skills.

answers.targetUsers: 潜在雇主、同行、技术爱好者
answers.mainGoal: 展示个人项目和技术能力
answers.keyFeatures: 清晰的项目展示、个人介绍、技术栈展示、联系信息

brief.executiveSummary: 该网站旨在展示个人的工程项目和技术能力，吸引潜在雇主和同行的注意。通过简洁的设计和清晰的内容结构，用户能够快速了解我的背景和专业技能。

userPersonas.needs: 展示个人能力和项目经验

brief.coreValueProposition: 通过专业的作品集展示，提升个人品牌形象

content.title: Building reliable data systems and web tools.
content.subtitle: I work across data engineering, backend development, analytics, and deployed product-facing applications.

content.title: About Me
content.text: I’m Xueyao Zhao, an Information Systems graduate focused on data engineering, backend development, and practical web applications. My work connects data workflows, system design, and user-facing tools.

content.title: Built with All You Can Make
content.subtitle: BUILT WITH MY OWN TOOL
content.text: This portfolio is also a live use case of All You Can Make, my modular website design system. It turns guided inputs or AI prompts into generated site structures, editable blocks, live previews, and export-ready static HTML.

content.title: Educational Background
content.subtitle: An interdisciplinary background in Information Systems, Economics, and Data Science, focused on data engineering, system design, and applied analytics.

items.title: Northeastern University
items.description: Bachelor's degree in Economics with a minor in Data Science

content.title: Technology Stack
content.subtitle: A practical stack spanning data engineering, backend development, databases, cloud deployment, and visualization, supporting projects from data pipelines to application interfaces.

items.title: Data Engineering
items.description: Building batch processing and analytical data pipelines.

items.title: Backend Development
items.description: Developing business logic and server-side applications.

items.title: Databases and Storage
items.description: Designing structured and unstructured data models.

items.title: Data Analysis and Visualization
items.description: Transforming data results into interactive insights.

items.title: Cloud and Development Tools
items.description: Supporting deployment, version control, and development workflows.

content.title: Selected Builds & Systems
content.subtitle: Deployed tools, product systems, and technical experiments built across data, design, and automation.

items.title: All You Can Make
items.description: A modular site builder that generates PRDs, sitemaps, block plans, and editable previews from guided inputs or AI prompts, with manual block editing, AI rewrite/rebuild, and HTML export.

detailBehavior.modalBody: A modular website design system that turns guided inputs or AI prompts into generated PRDs, sitemaps, block plans, and editable previews, with manual block editing, AI-assisted rewrite/rebuild, and static HTML export.
detailBehavior.expandedContent: Expanded inline details content loaded with high efficiency metrics.

items.title: Image Stitcher
items.description: A lightweight image stitching tool for combining multiple uploads vertically or horizontally, with spacing, sizing, background controls, and lossless PNG export.

detailBehavior.modalBody: A modular, high-performance offline compiler layout optimized for standard static websites.
detailBehavior.expandedContent: Expanded inline details content loaded with high efficiency metrics.

content.title: Data & Analytics Projects
content.subtitle: Selected data projects focused on large-scale processing, database systems, machine learning, and analytical visualization.

items.title: NYC Subway Data Platform & Analytics Pipeline
items.description: A large-scale data engineering pipeline for processing 110M+ NYC subway ridership records with Hadoop, Spark, Hive, Trino, and Airflow, producing analytics-ready layers and interactive congestion insights.

items.title: Chronic Disease Risk Prediction & Data System
items.description: A health data system combining SQL workflows and machine learning to model insurance-style processes, integrate structured health features, and predict chronic disease risk with Random Forest classification.

items.title: High-Performance Data Storage & Retrieval
items.description: A multi-database storage project using MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, and Neo4j to support high-throughput access patterns, recommendation queries, and unstructured data visualization.
